title: DAGGie's Extra Foods
description: Datapack that adds extra food to the game.
body:
Datapack that adds **3** foods in Minecraft.

![Crafting recipe for sushi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28505fc3396b7bbdb2e4ce5603a6b10d68580e86.png)
![Crafting recipe for potato stew](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/450d159db1430b8f76583b3ea3766772a3593bc8.png)
![Crafting recipe for chocolate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fb98d244cc9b4a5e23de617276969fd22d017f1.png)
![Crafting recipe for bamboo cake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/641ee05489d4da60649cdb7b3159f16e1533f86a.png)
![Crafting recipe for dumplings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7a8a6d1c4cd19c4186d13b44afdfbcd335115af.png)
